paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.67, representing an 8.91 percent increase from the prior close. Over a window of 21 sessions, the stock price has decreased by 25.7 percent.

There is one new news item in the last 24 hours, with the headline "RCS - Fermi Inc. - Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Call Date" from TradingView, announcing that Fermi Inc. will host an earnings call on August 13, 2026.

Recent SEC filings include a SCHEDULE 13G filed on July 20, 2026, and several 8-K filings, including one on July 15, 2026, regarding the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, and another on July 13, 2026, disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson. There is also one Form 4 filing in the feed.
